race.comment: INFUSION (2) dropped back to midweek company for the third run of the prep and was far more competitive, finishing second over 1250m at the Kensington track after coming from worse than midfield on the bend. Rock hard fit and saves her best for Canterbury. CROOK (1) made it three minor placings from three appearances this prep when she drove hard late but just missed over 1100m at Hawkesbury last time out. Raced wide with no cover that day to add merit to the performance. Ready for a crack at this level. YOU'RE THE CHOICE (8) is back after a 130-day spell. Yet to miss the frame in three first-up assignments. Trialling well and should give a good account again. BLENHEIM GIRL (10) resumes. Raced just twice in the maiden prep and progressed nicely. Cannot be underestimated. GAMP (6) returned to form at the Kensington track last start and is good enough to play a key role here.
